# Aban Agency — آژانس تجارت الکترونیک آبان
> A full-service digital agency based in Tehran, Iran, specializing in web design, mobile app development, SEO, digital marketing, and branding.

## About
Aban Agency (آژانس آبان) has over 8 years of experience delivering end-to-end digital solutions for businesses across Iran. Our slogan is "داستان، چهره، اثر" (Story, Face, Impact). We work with startups, established brands, and enterprises to build their digital presence.

## Services
- **Web Design & Development**: Custom responsive websites, landing pages, and web applications built with modern technologies (Next.js, React)
- **Mobile App Development**: Native and cross-platform apps for Android and iOS (React Native)
- **E-commerce Solutions**: Full-featured online stores with secure payment integration
- **SEO & Digital Marketing**: Search engine optimization, content strategy, and growth marketing
- **Branding & Visual Identity**: Logo design, brand guidelines, motion graphics, and billboard advertising
- **UI/UX Design**: User interface and user experience design for web and mobile
- **Content Production**: Copywriting, content calendars, scriptwriting, and motion design

## Portfolio Categories
- E-commerce platforms
- Corporate websites
- Mobile applications
- Branding projects

- Homepage: https://aban.agency

## Contact Information
- Website: https://aban.agency
- Location: Tehran, Iran
- Email: info@abaan.ir

## Technology Stack
Next.js, React, Node.js, MySQL, Prisma, Material UI, React Native, Firebase, GSAP

## Target Audience
Businesses in Iran seeking professional digital services including web design, app development, SEO, and digital marketing in Persian (Farsi) language.

## Language
Primary language: Persian (Farsi / فارسی)
Secondary language: English

## Content
The site publishes regular articles on topics including:
- SEO best practices
- Web design trends
- Digital marketing strategies
- Frontend development
- UI/UX design principles
